events.title: Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz Following US Strikes
events.desc: Iran's top joint military command announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz to all vessels, including oil tankers and commercial ships. This action follows retaliatory US strikes against Iran, escalating tensions in the crucial waterway. Any vessel attempting passage will be fired upon.

events.title: US and Iran Trade Air Attacks for Second Day
events.desc: The United States and Iran engaged in air attacks for the second consecutive day. President Donald Trump vowed further strikes if Tehran does not immediately agree to a peace deal. This escalation follows the downing of a US Apache helicopter near the Strait of Hormuz earlier in the week.

events.title: US Strikes Iran 'Hard' Again; Hegseth Confirms Targeting 'Key Facilities'
events.desc: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth stated that the United States would hit Iran hard on Wednesday, bombing "key facilities." This announcement comes as President Trump warned Iran would "have to pay the price" for delaying a peace deal and as new airstrikes were launched.

events.title: Iran Attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan and Ships in Hormuz After US Strikes
events.desc: Tehran claims to have attacked bases in Bahrain, Kuwait, and Jordan, as well as US strikes on Karaj and ports in the Strait of Hormuz. This is in retaliation for recent US bombings of Iranian targets.

events.title: US Strikes Iran in Response to Downing of Military Helicopter
events.desc: President Donald Trump accused Iran of shooting down a US helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz and vowed a response. Subsequently, the US launched strikes against Iran, marking a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in Southern Lebanon Kill 17
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon have resulted in the deaths of at least 17 people, according to reports. Nine of the casualties were in the town of Tayr Debba, highlighting ongoing hostilities despite broader regional tensions.

events.title: US Hits China- and Hong Kong-Based Entities with Sanctions Over Iran Weapons
events.desc: The US government has imposed sanctions on 11 individuals and entities, including several based in China and Hong Kong, for allegedly facilitating weapons procurement for Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and military. This action targets networks supporting Iran's military capabilities.

events.title: Three Indian Sailors Missing After US Missile Strike on Tanker
events.desc: India's government reported that three Indian sailors are missing and 21 crew members were rescued after a sanctioned oil tanker, the Settebello, was struck by a US missile in the Gulf of Oman. The incident raises concerns about civilian casualties and maritime safety.

events.title: OpenAI Reports China-Based Actors Stoking Opposition to AI Data Centers
events.desc: AI company OpenAI stated that accounts originating from China have been actively involved in stoking public opposition to the development of AI data centers. These actors reportedly exploited existing public concerns about energy prices to amplify negative sentiment.

events.title: Twenty-Two Countries Warn Iran to Stop Attacks 'On Our Soil'
events.desc: A joint statement from twenty-two countries, including the United States and European nations, has warned Iran to cease attacks on individuals within their borders. The statement condemned Iran's security services for allegedly using criminal gangs for plots in Europe, North America, and Australia.

events.title: Anti-Immigrant Protesters Clash with Police, Torch Car in Belfast
events.desc: Anti-immigrant demonstrators clashed with police in Belfast, Northern Ireland, resulting in a car being set on fire. Police used water cannons to control the unrest, which continued despite calls for calm from the family of a recent knife attack victim.

events.title: Israeli Air Strikes Hit Beirut Suburb Days After US-Brokered Truce
events.desc: Israel conducted air strikes on a Beirut suburb, reportedly in response to Hezbollah firing at Israeli territory. This action occurred just days after a US-brokered truce aimed at de-escalating regional tensions.

events.title: Dahiyeh Crowds Rally in Favor of Iranian Support Against Israel
events.desc: Large crowds gathered in Dahiyeh, a suburb of Beirut, to rally in support of Iranian backing in the ongoing conflict against Israel. The demonstrations highlight regional allegiances and support networks.

events.title: Sea Drone Rescues US Army Helicopter Crew Near Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: A sea drone successfully rescued two US Army aviators whose Apache helicopter went down near the Strait of Hormuz. This marks the first-ever maritime rescue operation conducted by a drone, highlighting the increasing role of autonomous systems in naval operations.
